prd.oneLiner: Connect candidate skills, client roles, submission and interview history, offers, and performance analysis.
prd.goal: Reduce lead time from candidate submission to interview by 20% and improve role-fill rate.
prd.whyNow: Candidate history, client orders, role progress, and contact activity are separated, making matching priority and coordination difficult.
prd.problem: Candidate history, client orders, role progress, and contact activity are separated, making matching priority and coordination difficult.
prd.solution: Connect candidate skills, client roles, submission and interview history, offers, and performance analysis.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Recruiter managing candidates and client companies
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Candidate history, client orders, role progress, and contact activity are separated, making matching priority and coordination difficult.

targets.name: Recruiting agency operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Candidate history, client orders, role progress, and contact activity are separated, making matching priority and coordination difficult.

scenarios.text: Recruiter managing candidates and client companies completes candidate, client, and job-order capture and checks progress.
Recruiting agency operations coordinator reviews submission, interview, placement conversion, and client-performance reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce lead time from candidate submission to interview by 20% and improve role-fill rate.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Candidate skills, role, submission, and stage-status lookup
Role matching, candidate submission, interview coordination, and placement management
Submission, interview, placement conversion, and client-performance reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
